title: Production deployment hardening
summary: Prepared the demo deployment config for a production-grade rollout with blue-green strategy and strict health checks.
goal: Harden the deployment demo so production releases are explicit, safe, and health-check driven.
changesMade: Changed the demo deployment strategy to blue-green
Added strict health-check and rollback defaults

features.name: production blue-green rollout
features.why: Use zero-downtime production deployment semantics and ensure failed rollouts can revert quickly.

decisions.why: A production release should fail fast if the new version does not pass the readiness check.

openQuestions: Should production rollout also require post-deploy smoke tests before traffic cutover?
resumePrompt: Continue the production hardening path. Preserve blue-green rollout semantics, production target, and strict health-check behavior when resolving conflicts.
